title: gladiolus serpenticola
intro: Gladiolus serpenticola, also known as the twisted sword lily, is a species of cormous perennial plant that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its saponin and flavonoid content. The health benefits of Gladiolus serpenticola include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Gladiolus serpenticola can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support digestive health and reduce stress.
